SEARCH
Package com.orasaka.identity.service

Interface IdentityService

public interface IdentityService
Port interface defining the identity lifecycle contract consumed by the gateway adapter layer.

The gateway binds exclusively to this interface via constructor injection. The concrete implementation (IdentityServiceImpl) is package-private within orasaka-identity and discovered by Spring component scanning.

Architectural invariants:

  • Gateway has zero compile-time awareness of the implementation class [ERR-102]
  • All methods return domain records, never entities [§2.A Model Separation]
  • Authentication failures throw explicit exceptions, never return null [ERR-106]
See Also:
  • User

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    User
    authenticate(String email, String password)
    Authenticates a user by email and password, filtering out disabled accounts.
    User
    getUser(String userId)
    Resolves a complete User profile by their unique identifier.
    User
    register(String username, String email, String password, String language)
    Registers a new user account, initiating verification or interceptions if configured.
    void
    resolveInterception(UUID userId, String interceptionType, String schemaId, Map<String,Object> responses)
    Resolves an active interception by merging replies and deleting the block row.
    User
    updatePreferences(String userId, Map<String,Object> preferences)
    Merges preferences map into user preferences.
    boolean
    verifyToken(String token)
    Verifies a verification token and enables the target user account.

  • Method Details

    • getUser

      User getUser(String userId)
      Resolves a complete User profile by their unique identifier.
      Parameters:
      userId - The UUID string identifying the user.
      Returns:
      The resolved User record, or null if no user exists.

    • authenticate

      User authenticate(String email, String password)
      Authenticates a user by email and password, filtering out disabled accounts.
      Parameters:
      email - Plaintext email.
      password - Plaintext password.
      Returns:
      Fully resolved User if successful.
      Throws:
      BadCredentialsException - if authentication fails.

    • register

      User register(String username, String email, String password, String language)
      Registers a new user account, initiating verification or interceptions if configured.
      Parameters:
      username - Display name.
      email - Email address (must be unique).
      password - Plaintext password to hash.
      language - Initial language preference.
      Returns:
      Fully resolved User.
      Throws:
      UserAlreadyExistsException - if email is taken.

    • updatePreferences

      User updatePreferences(String userId, Map<String,Object> preferences)
      Merges preferences map into user preferences.
      Parameters:
      userId - The user UUID string.
      preferences - The preference overrides to merge.
      Returns:
      Fully resolved updated User record.

    • resolveInterception

      void resolveInterception(UUID userId, String interceptionType, String schemaId, Map<String,Object> responses)
      Resolves an active interception by merging replies and deleting the block row.
      Parameters:
      userId - The user ID.
      interceptionType - The type of interception.
      schemaId - The configuration schema ID.
      responses - Map of user inputs to merge.

    • verifyToken

      boolean verifyToken(String token)
      Verifies a verification token and enables the target user account.
      Parameters:
      token - Plaintext token.
      Returns:
      True if verified successfully; false otherwise.
